_note: Synthetic Grover-search-3-in-{0..15} with 4 search qubits + 1 ancilla. 3 oracle iterations. The marked answer 3 = |0011> dominates with ~96% probability on a noiseless simulator (verified offline; see grover_3_in_16.pho header). On real hardware the depth-1539 ECR-decomposed circuit accumulates ~99.7% gate error so the actual histogram will be much flatter; this cassette gives the noiseless-shape demo. Bit ordering: the leftmost bit in each 5-bit string is the ancilla (q[4], expected 0); the next four are q[3], q[2], q[1], q[0] (Qiskit-style big-endian print of little-endian register, with q[0] = LSB).
